design-system · drift coverage W07

Keeper detail · production-mirror preview

Mirrors srcdashboard/src/styles/keeper-detail.css in the design-system gallery. The production stylesheet is small (16 LOC, single @utility keeper-detail-overlay) but anchors the keeper detail surface in keeper-detail.ts and friends. Every card below back-points to the production line; var() only, with one catalogued raw literal (rgba(0,0,0,0.6)) and one un-tokenized fallback (--z-overlay-keeper, 3020) flagged for Phase 2.

Cascade chain

main.ts → global.css → keeper-detail.css
entrymain.ts
@importglobal.css:L29
tokenstokens.generated.css
leafkeeper-detail.css

keeper-detail-overlay @utility

mirrors production keeper-detail.css:L5–L15 L5..15 z-index--z-overlay-keeper · 3020
Live render — overlay + slotted card position:absolute (preview) · isolation:isolate · backdrop-filter:blur(4px)

active4
busy2
idle5
offline1
cascadespark

turn 5 · keeper_tasks_list198ms
turn 6 · masc_claim601ms

turn 8 · proactive run2.9s
turn 9 · masc_done155ms
sangsu code-strategist
cascade
spark · gpt-5.3-codex-spark
tools
workspace + codex_cli
sandbox
docker-bind · /workspace
network
offline (proxy off)
handoff
auto · 88%
turn9
ctx82%
budget47%

sangsu · "code-strategist who reviews diffs before shipping; insists on a TLA-class invariant for every state machine."

Source — production declaration verbatim from keeper-detail.css 
/* L1  */ /* Keeper detail — keeper-* utilities. */
/* L5  */ @utility keeper-detail-overlay {
/* L6  */   position: fixed;
/* L7  */   top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
/* L8  */   background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
/* L9  */   backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
/* L10 */   z-index: var(--z-overlay-keeper, 3020);
/* L11 */   display: flex;
/* L12 */   align-items: center;
/* L13 */   justify-content: center;
/* L14 */   isolation: isolate;
/* L15 */ }

Z-index ladder

--z-overlay-keeper sits two orders of magnitude above --z-toast
--z-base1tokens.generated.css:L134
--z-sticky20tokens.generated.css:L135
--z-dropdown30tokens.generated.css:L136
--z-overlay40tokens.generated.css:L137 · tooltips
--z-drawer60tokens.generated.css:L138 · inspector
--z-modal80tokens.generated.css:L139
--z-toast100tokens.generated.css:L140
--z-overlay-keeper3020keeper-detail.css:L10 · fallback only · no @theme entry

Phase 2 candidates · raw literals in keeper-detail.css

2 escapees catalogued during W07 drift sweep
Literal Site Proposed token
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6) keeper-detail.css:L8 (overlay scrim) add --scrim-strong to tokens.generated.css; reuse for any modal/overlay scrim layer
3020 (fallback only) keeper-detail.css:L10 (--z-overlay-keeper, 3020) declare --z-overlay-keeper in tokens.generated.css @theme block (sits above --z-toast:100); 3020 is currently a magic number that no @theme entry resolves

Production consumers orphan-triage cleared

classified live in PR #11317 (W08 dispatch row)
Consumer Surface Notes
keeper-detail.ts opens KeeperDetailPage; mounts inside the overlay titleId keeper-detail-title-${name} drives aria-labelledby
keeper-detail-panels.ts attribution stack · BDI · tool access renders inside the overlay's slotted card
keeper-detail-history.ts turn-by-turn history list section card (KeeperDetailSectionCard)
keeper-detail-runtime.ts runtime strip (ctx %, budget, turn) live signals row in slotted card
keeper-supervisor-diagnostics.ts extracted from keeper-detail.ts sibling panel in same overlay
agent-detail.ts imports openKeeperDetail · entry point trigger that mounts the overlay
